summary: Entrance Layer Landing Page testing complete. All frontend elements render correctly: globe background (WebGL), compass geometry (CSS), headline ('Actions build trust.' + 'Trust shapes opportunity.'), CTA buttons, micro-message blocks, footer. CTA navigates to /app/feed. All /app/* routes load. 12/12 backend regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: PlatformLandingPage.js correctly implements entrance layer with GlobeBackground, CompassGeometry, and MicroMessage components
All data-testids present: entrance-page, entrance-hero, entrance-headline, entrance-cta, entrance-globe, entrance-ideas, micro-msg-0/1/2, entrance-cta-bottom, entrance-footer
CTA onClick correctly navigates to /app/feed using window.location.href
IntersectionObserver used for scroll-reveal animation on micro-messages (progressive enhancement)
CSS animations include compassSpin, entranceReveal, hintBounce - all working
Responsive breakpoints at 768px and 480px working correctly
Footer shows 'Philos' (styled uppercase via CSS text-transform)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Entrance Layer landing page fully implemented. Key data-testids: entrance-page, entrance-hero, entrance-headline, entrance-cta, entrance-globe, entrance-compass (.class), entrance-ideas, micro-msg-0/1/2, entrance-cta-bottom, entrance-footer. Globe uses react-globe.gl - DOM element exists but WebGL may not render in headless browsers. Compass geometry is pure CSS (compass-ring-1/2/3, compass-crosshair, compass-tick). Micro-messages have IntersectionObserver for scroll reveal. CTA navigates to /app/feed.

features_verified./app/profile loads (with auth): PASS - shows 'Sign in to view profile' message
features_verified./app/dashboard loads: PASS - shows 'Sign in to view dashboard' message
